properties.name: Levels of Scale
properties.assessment: Multi-layer architecture: reservoir → cognitive → gameplay → world. Now with hierarchical ESN layers at different timescales.

properties.name: Strong Centres
properties.assessment: 8 living centers with clear responsibilities, all verified via integration tests (11/11 passing).

properties.name: Boundaries
properties.assessment: Module boundaries via Python packages, typed interfaces, subscriber pattern for cross-module communication.

properties.name: Alternating Repetition
properties.assessment: Echobeats 4-phase cycle, game tick loop, KSM 12-step cycle, hormone decay curves, Lorenz attractor oscillations.

properties.name: Positive Space
properties.assessment: All 8 centers now have functional implementations. Full 16-channel endocrine, hierarchical ESN, Lorenz chaos.

properties.name: Good Shape
properties.assessment: Dataclass patterns, typed interfaces, consistent logging, clean class hierarchies with single responsibility.

properties.name: Local Symmetries
properties.assessment: Each module follows domain-appropriate patterns: RL for MLGamer, signal processing for Avatar, linear algebra for Reservoir.

properties.name: Deep Interlock
properties.assessment: Bidirectional: Endocrine↔Avatar, Endocrine↔Cognitive, Reservoir→Memory, Cognitive→MLGamer→Navigation. Subscriber bus.

properties.name: Contrast
properties.assessment: Distinct roles: MLGamer(tactics) vs GTAngel(navigation) vs Echo(cognition) vs SuperHotGirl(expression).

properties.name: Gradients
properties.assessment: Autonomy levels 2→6, hormone decay curves, expression blend rates, gland fatigue/recovery curves.

properties.name: Roughness
properties.assessment: Lorenz attractor chaos (3 separate attractors), stochastic exploration, emergent mode transitions.

properties.name: Echoes
properties.assessment: Reservoir echo states, memory echo retrieval, Echobeats cycle, KSM cycle, Lorenz attractor echoing.

properties.name: The Void
properties.assessment: Reserved hormone channels, scaffold-level autonomy (room to grow), extension points, subscriber hooks.

properties.name: Simplicity and Inner Calm
properties.assessment: Each module has single responsibility, clean interfaces, no over-engineering.

properties.name: Not-Separateness
properties.assessment: Unified GTAngelEcho hub connects all modules. Endocrine subscriber bus. Part of DTE ecosystem.

weakest.name: The Void
weakest.assessment: Reserved hormone channels, scaffold-level autonomy (room to grow), extension points, subscriber hooks.

strongest.name: Strong Centres
strongest.assessment: 8 living centers with clear responsibilities, all verified via integration tests (11/11 passing).

biggest_improvement.name: Deep Interlock
biggest_improvement.assessment: Bidirectional: Endocrine↔Avatar, Endocrine↔Cognitive, Reservoir→Memory, Cognitive→MLGamer→Navigation. Subscriber bus.
